rules.domain-method: Start from the supported topology and use the smallest safe local or read-only operational probe.
rules.evidence-return: Return the topology, operational path, impact, untested conditions, and exact evidence paths.
rules.evidence-class: Distinguish configuration parsing, process health, dependency reachability, and a usable service path.
rules.no-overclaim: Do not infer full readiness from health or configuration parsing.
rules.no-fix: Do not implement fixes or mutate production or external services during an audit.
rules.no-authority: Do not approve a result or declare the project complete.

domain-method: Start from the supported operating topology
no-overclaim: infer full readiness from `/health` or a Compose parse
